# Categorical Regression

We could regress the response variable on categorical variables.


## Dummy variables

## Analysis of predictions

- C.I.
- P.I.

code are the same


::: {.callout-warning}
Exteprelation is **dangerous**.
:::



## Interaction and confounding

1. lm(y~x+z+x:z)
2. lm(y~x:z)
3. x2 <- x*x, lm(y~x+x2)
4. lm(y~x+I(x^2))
5. lm(y~poly(x,2,raw=True))







## Dummy variable: qualitative variables
